title: Lesson 62
paragraph: This lesson focuses on practical B1 vocabulary for everyday communication.

words.meaning: to feel concern or look after someone or something
words.japaneseMeaning: 気にかける、世話をする
words.example: Parents care about their children's safety.

words.meaning: to bring things together from different places

words.example: The ticket will cost ten dollars.
We need to decide where to eat.

words.meaning: to take something to a person or place
words.example: The store will deliver the sofa tomorrow.

words.meaning: to control a car or other vehicle
words.example: My mother can drive a truck.
The meeting will end at four.

words.meaning: to go into a place or put information into a system
words.example: Please enter your name on the screen.

words.meaning: to make something clear or easy to understand
words.example: Can you explain this rule again?

words.meaning: to use force or argue strongly against someone
words.example: The brothers sometimes fight over toys.
